ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: auto focus node when create new node
ast.target: 创建新节点时自动聚焦该节点

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Custom your hotkey to create a child node, default is Tab. 
        You can use any letter, number, or modifier combined with 
        a letter or number, e.g., \u300CC\u300Dor\u300Ccmd + C\u300Dto create a child node.
        Use\u300C+\u300Dto separate modifiers and alphanumeric characters.
ast.target: 自定义创建子节点的快捷键，默认为 Tab。\n        您可以使用任何字母、数字或修饰键与字母或数字的组合，例如 \\u300CC\\u300D 或 \\u300Ccmd + C\\u300D 来创建子节点。\n        使用 \\u300C+\\u300D 分隔修饰键和字母数字字符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Custom your hotkey to create a sibling node before the current node. Default is Shift+Enter. Same as 'Create Child Node'.
ast.target: 自定义在当前节点之前创建同级节点的快捷键。默认为 Shift+Enter。与“创建子节点”相同。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Custom your hotkey to create a sibling node after the current node. Default is Enter. Same as 'Create Child Node'.
ast.target: 自定义在当前节点之后创建同级节点的快捷键。默认为 Enter。与“创建子节点”相同。
